name: Pushka Pawn Shop Inc
description_short: Pushka Pawnshop Inc. offers collateral-based cash loans for gold jewelry and fine items, operating as a licensed New York pawnbroker with 35+ years of jewelry industry expertise.
description_long:
Pushka Pawnshop Inc. is a New York-licensed pawnbroker (DOCA #1269318) founded by David, a pawnbroker with 35+ years in the jewelry industry. David began his career in 1989 as a trainee at a Bronx jewelry store, advanced to store manager, and established his own jewelry retail business "King David Jewelry" in 1997 before launching Pushka Pawnshop. His background includes expertise as a loose diamond grader, watch maker, and fine jewelry appraiser.

Pushka Pawnshop provides fast, secure, and discreet cash loan services using gold jewelry and fine jewelry as collateral. The company operates nationally, serving customers from "East to West, North to South" across the U.S.A. according to their website. The process is straightforward: customers contact the pawnbroker to discuss the loan amount before shipping items, ensuring agreement on terms before any transaction occurs. The business emphasizes personalized service and professional handling of each client's valuables.

Pushka Pawnshop distinguishes itself through its owner's specialized credentials in jewelry valuation and repair, combined with decades of hands-on experience in the jewelry sector. Rather than operating as a general pawnshop accepting diverse collateral, the company has positioned itself as a jewelry-focused lending operation, suggesting more refined appraisal capabilities. The emphasis on discretion, security, and pre-transaction agreement differentiates their model from typical walk-in pawn operations.

A key limitation is the lack of physical retail location information or service hours on the website, suggesting this may be a mail-in or appointment-based service. The company's website provides minimal detail on loan terms, interest rates, repayment timelines, or maximum/minimum loan amounts. Customers must contact via phone (718-206-2799) to obtain specific loan quotes and terms, which may be less transparent than competitors offering published rate schedules.
pros: Owner has 35+ years of jewelry industry experience dating to 1989, including certification as loose diamond grader and watch maker
Licensed pawnbroker in New York State with specific registration (DOCA #1269318)
Operates nationwide service from "East to West, North to South" without geographic restrictions
Requires pre-transaction agreement on loan amounts before clients ship items, reducing surprise rejections
Emphasizes discretion and security in handling valuables
Personalized service model with professional assessment from owner David directly
Specializes exclusively in jewelry and precious metals rather than general collateral
cons: Website contains no published interest rates, fees, loan terms, or repayment timelines—requires phone contact for all details
No physical store address or business hours listed; appears to be mail-in or appointment-only with unclear accessibility
Minimal information on loan amounts offered (minimum/maximum ranges not specified)
Website lacks customer reviews, testimonials, or third-party ratings to verify service quality
No details on dispute resolution, buyback terms, or consequences if items are not redeemed
best_for: Gold and jewelry owners needing quick cash without bank loan applications
Individuals seeking discretion in short-term lending transactions
High-net-worth customers with valuable jewelry who want expert appraisal from certified gemologists
Customers nationwide who prefer mail-in transactions over in-person pawn shop visits
diagnosis: Pushka Pawnshop is best for jewelry owners seeking collateral-based loans with expert appraisal, particularly those valuing discretion and owner expertise over convenience. The major caveat is the complete lack of transparent pricing—borrowers must call (718-206-2799) with items to obtain interest rates, terms, and loan amounts, making advance comparison shopping impossible.
services: Cash loans secured by gold jewelry collateral
Cash loans secured by fine jewelry collateral
Personalized loan consultation with certified pawnbroker
